_schema_note: SAFE breaker schema. The AGGRESSIVE breaker (automation/state/aggressive/circuit-breaker.json) uses a fully divergent vocabulary (C9 symmetry trap). Field-name mapping SAFE -> AGGRESSIVE: tripped->tripped (SAME, both present); tripped_reason->trip_reason; tripped_at->tripped_at_et; starting_equity_today->equity_start_of_day; current_equity->equity_current; daily_loss_limit_dollars/_pct->loss_pct (aggressive stores realized loss %, not the limit).
